page_title: List of Attack on Titan episodes/Season 3
text:
This is a list of all the episodes from the Attack on Titan anime's third season.

Episodes

These episodes were aired in split parts. Part 1 from July 23, 2018 to October 15, 2018 and Part 2 from April 29, 2019 to July 1, 2019 on in Japan.

Navigation

de:Liste der Attack on Titan-Episoden/Staffel 3
